'''Bakura''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].<ref name="TEA" />
